summary: A8 Ventas Comparativas (Sales Comparative period vs period) validated end-to-end. All 9 backend pytest cases passed and Playwright UI flow confirms sidebar entry, self-fetching component, side-by-side headlines, 9-metric table with correct deltas (-4,464 / -24.39% for total_sales; +4 / +21.05% for bills_count), TrendingUp/Down icons, N/A edge case, PDF/XLSX downloads with valid magic bytes, and responsive mobile stacking.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is 1150 lines — still within acceptable range but future splits recommended if more self-fetching reports are added
SalesComparativeReport.jsx is clean (244 lines), uses useCallback correctly, and respects the pos_token auth pattern consistently with other reports
seed_data_creation: None - used existing real dataset 2026-04-01..20 (42 paid invoices)
context_for_next_testing_agent: A8 Ventas Comparativas verified green. Backend endpoint /api/reports/sales-comparative returns period_a/period_b snapshots + metrics[] with diff/pct (null when period_a value=0). XLSX has real formulas in col D (=C{row}-B{row}) and col E (=IF(B{row}=0,"N/A",(C{row}-B{row})/B{row})) - verified via openpyxl. Auth Bearer enforced on /xlsx/sales-comparative/{xlsx,pdf}. Regression: /api/reports/daily-sales and /api/reports/open-checks still 200 OK.
verified_flows: Sidebar 'Ventas y Caja' -> 'Ventas Comparativas' entry at end (data-testid=report-sales-comparative)
Date pickers sc-a-from/to, sc-b-from/to, Actualizar button triggers GET /api/reports/sales-comparative with all 4 params
Headlines side-by-side with ArrowRight (sc-vs-arrow visible in desktop)
9-metric table (sc-metric-row-0..8) with Métrica | Período A | Período B | Diferencia | % Cambio
Expected values: total_sales 18304 vs 13840 (-4464, -24.39%), bills_count 19 vs 23 (+4, +21.05%)
PDF download valid (%PDF, 20765B) and XLSX valid (PK, 5933B)
XLSX col D contains string formula =C{row}-B{row} and col E =IF(B{row}=0,"N/A",(C{row}-B{row})/B{row}) (verified by load_workbook with default data_only=False)
Mobile viewport 390x844: date pickers stack vertically
Auth enforced: /xlsx/sales-comparative/xlsx and /pdf both return 401/403 without Bearer
